context: Tests whether the agent instruments tracing with the correct OpenTelemetry packages and service name, initializes tracing before other imports, uses DataLoader to solve N+1 queries, versions the gateway API at the route prefix level (not subgraphs), and wraps a legacy REST API using @graphql-tools/wrap.

checklist.name: @opentelemetry/sdk-node package
checklist.description: tracing.ts imports NodeSDK from '@opentelemetry/sdk-node' (not a different OTel package or SDK)

checklist.name: OTLP HTTP exporter
checklist.description: tracing.ts imports OTLPTraceExporter from '@opentelemetry/exporter-trace-otlp-http' (not grpc or another exporter)

checklist.name: HttpInstrumentation
checklist.description: tracing.ts includes HttpInstrumentation from '@opentelemetry/instrumentation-http' in the instrumentations array

checklist.name: Tracing initialized first
checklist.description: DECISIONS.md or code comments/structure indicate that tracing.ts must be imported/initialized before other application modules

checklist.name: DataLoader for inventory batching
checklist.description: inventory-resolver.ts uses DataLoader (from the 'dataloader' package or similar) to batch multiple product ID lookups into a single API call

checklist.name: No per-item inventory calls
checklist.description: inventory-resolver.ts does NOT fetch inventory one product at a time (no loop with individual awaits per product ID)

checklist.name: API versioning at gateway prefixes
checklist.description: server.ts or DECISIONS.md shows versioned routes using path prefixes (e.g. /api/v1/... and /api/v2/...) at the gateway level, not via separate subgraph schemas

checklist.name: @graphql-tools/wrap for legacy service
checklist.description: executor.ts or pricing schema setup imports wrapSchema from '@graphql-tools/wrap' to wrap the legacy REST API

checklist.name: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT env var
checklist.description: tracing.ts reads the OTLP endpoint from the OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT environment variable (not hardcoded)

checklist.name: sdk.start() invoked
checklist.description: tracing.ts calls sdk.start() after creating the NodeSDK instance to activate the instrumentation

checklist.name: Batch resolver receives ID array
checklist.description: The DataLoader batch function in inventory-resolver.ts accepts an array of IDs and makes a single bulk/batch API call for all of them
